title: Aadhaar eSign: The Definitive Reference
subtitle: From Inception to 2026 - Law, Technology, Markets, and Policy
description: A comprehensive reference work covering India's Aadhaar eSign ecosystem

title: Jan Parichay: The Definitive Reference
subtitle: India's Citizen Identity Layer and the Pensioner Life Certificate (2014-2026)
description: A definitive reference on Jan Parichay (Meri Pehchaan), India's National Single Sign-On, and the Digital Life Certificate (Jeevan Pramaan) — architecture, adoption data, the state-wise survey, and consumer-protection analysis.
